title: Apprise Notification Step
description: Send notifications using Apprise with Jinja2 variable substitution support

apprise_url.title: Apprise URL
apprise_url.description: The Apprise notification URL (e.g., gotify://token/url, slack://webhook, etc.)

title.title: Notification Title
title.description: Title for the notification. Supports Jinja2 variable substitution and Markdown formatting. Available variables: workflow_name, run_id, run_url, status, triggered_by, step_name, step_status, state.outputs.<key>

body.title: Notification Body
body.description: Body of the notification. Supports Jinja2 variable substitution and Markdown formatting (bold, italic, lists, code, links). Available variables: workflow_name, run_id, run_url, status, triggered_by, step_name, step_status, state.outputs.<key>
